The '''Kyber Royal Family''' was the ruling family of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Troska]], which directly controlled the planet's fuel refineries. In the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], it only grudgingly supported the Imperial garrison and frequently protested Imperial taxation of its fuel revenues.

Members of the family included the [[King/Legends|King]] [[Natas Kyber]] and his son, [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Torino Kyber|Torino]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Overkill]]''
